tasks.subject: Request code review for pi-llama-watch extension
tasks.description: Dispatch superpowers-code-reviewer to review the complete pi-llama-watch extension before live testing.

tasks.subject: Fix critical TPS bug — tokensDecoded not tokens-per-second
tasks.description: LlamaState.ts:115 displays tokensDecoded (cumulative counter, e.g. 50) as "/s" making it look like 50t/s when it's actually total decoded tokens. Fix by tracking timestamps between polls and computing actual TPS.

tasks.subject: Fix type import in format.test.ts + add tsconfig test include
tasks.description: format.test.ts imports LlamaState class as type instead of LlamaStateData interface. Also add **/*.test.ts to tsconfig.json include to catch this in future.

tasks.subject: Fix remaining important issues from review
tasks.description:
- Add connection health indicator (clear stale state on consecutive failures)
- Fix progress tracking for generating slots
- Clean up verbose comment in LlamaState.ts
- Fix weak malformed data test assertion
